items.title: Caterpillar Stock Jumps. Its AI Potential Is Bigger Than You Think.
items.description: Artificial intelligence has its tentacles in many sectors of the economy beyond big tech, including heavy machinery.  JPMorgan analyst Tami Zakaria took a stab at sizing the opportunity in a Tuesday report.  “We estimate a potential for greater than $10 incremental earnings per share in the base case over the next three years, with capacity constraints the gating factor,” Zakaria wrote.

items.title: Caterpillar Leads Dow Jones Amid These Analyst Comments
items.description: JPMorgan analyst Tami Zakaria on Tuesday raised her price target to 650 from 505 and kept an overweight rating.

items.title: What Does Norway's Divestment Mean for Caterpillar's 2025 Valuation?
items.description: Thinking about what to do with Caterpillar stock right now? You are not alone. The shares have climbed fast and far, and plenty of investors are asking themselves if there is still room to run. In fact, Caterpillar just turned in a remarkable 17.0% rally over the past month. That is after soaring 40.3% since the start of the year and posting an incredible 232.4% gain in the last five years. For seasoned investors, these kinds of numbers do not just happen without reason. Recent headlines have...

items.title: Stock Market Today: Stocks surge after Powell signals more rate cuts ahead
items.description: It was a roller-coaster kind of day for stocks. China's retaliation against a new tariff threat from President Trump weighed heavily on the open. In time, the fears faded. Then, the Fed's Jerome Powell signaled more interest-rate cuts are ahead, and much of the market rebounded. But some of the ...
